name: Filter Advanced
description: Advanced Filter Node - Split incoming data into two logical outputs based on flexible conditions. Supports simple column-based filters, powerful date-based filtering, and fully custom boolean expressions for precise row-level control.
input: Accepts a DataFrame from the previous node as input.
output: Produces filtered DataFrame outputs based on the defined conditions, separating rows that satisfy the filter logic from those that do not.

fields.name: inputCol
fields.title: Input Column
fields.description: Select the column on which the basic filter condition will be applied. Supports string, numeric, and boolean data types.

fields.name: operator
fields.title: Expression
fields.description: Choose the comparison operator to apply on the input column (e.g., greater than, equals, not equals, is null, is not null). This defines how the column value is evaluated.

fields.name: conditionValue
fields.title: Condition Value
fields.description: Value to compare against the input column when using comparison operators. Not required for isNull or isNotNull operations.

fields.name: inputDateCol
fields.title: Input Date Column
fields.description: Select the date or timestamp column on which date-based filtering will be applied.

fields.name: filterBy
fields.title: Filter By
fields.description:
Choose how date filtering should be applied:
• Range - filter rows between a start and end date
• Start Date and Period After - include rows occurring after a start date for a defined period
• End Date and Period Before - include rows occurring before an end date for a defined period

fields.name: startDate
fields.title: Start Date
fields.description: Start date for date-based filtering, formatted as yyyy-MM-dd. Used as the lower boundary in range or period-based filters.

fields.name: endDate
fields.title: End Date
fields.description: End date for date-based filtering, formatted as yyyy-MM-dd. Used as the upper boundary in range or period-based filters.

fields.name: periodType
fields.title: Period Type
fields.description: Define the unit of time (days, weeks, months, or years) when using period-based date filtering.

fields.name: numPeriods
fields.title: Number of Periods
fields.description: Number of time units to include before or after the reference date when using period-based filtering.

fields.name: conditionExpr
fields.title: Conditional Expression
fields.description: Advanced boolean filter expression using SQL-style syntax. Supports AND/OR logic, parentheses, and multiple column conditions (e.g., usd_pledged_real > 0 AND (category = 1 OR category = 2) AND goal > 100). Rows not matching the expression are excluded.
